summary: Frontend-only testing of P0 fixes: Modal centering and Report Modal redesign. All modals are now properly centered on viewport (not offset by sidebar). Report Modal has all new UI elements as requested.

issues: Recharts width/height -1 warnings on initial load (known issue from previous iterations)
HTML hydration warnings about span inside select/option/tbody elements - minor React console warnings, not affecting functionality

passed_tests: Login with demo@aslanbasoto.com / demo123 works correctly
Report Modal: Opens via 'Raporlar' button on dashboard
Report Modal: CENTERED at viewport center (x=512, width=896, center=960px = exact viewport center)
Report Modal: Has icons on all 6 report type buttons (Genel, İşletme, Stok, Satılan, Kapora, Araç)
Report Modal: PDF button is RED with destructive styling
Report Modal: Yazdır button is YELLOW/AMBER with amber-500 styling
Report Modal: 3 financial summary cards present (Toplam Gelir, Toplam Gider, Net Kâr)
Report Modal: Transaction table with columns (Tarih, Tür, Kategori, Açıklama, Tutar)
Report Modal: Signature section present (Muhasebe/Onay and company representative)
Report Modal: Dynamic title changes based on report type (Finansal Durum Raporu, İşletme Raporu, etc.)
Report Modal: 'Araç' type shows vehicle filter (Plaka Ara input + Araç Seç dropdown)
Report Modal: Vehicle dropdown shows car count (4 araç)
AddCarModal: CENTERED at viewport center (x=576, width=768, center=960px)
AddCarModal: Opens via 'quick-add-car' button in sidebar
AddCustomerModal: CENTERED at viewport center (x=736, width=448, center=960px)
AddCustomerModal: Opens via 'Müşteri Ekle' button on customers page
ExpenseModal: CENTERED at viewport center (x=736, width=448, center=960px)
ExpenseModal: Opens via 'quick-add-expense' button in sidebar
All modals close with Escape key
Dashboard loads correctly with all charts and stat cards
critical_code_review_comments: Modal centering fix in dialog.jsx (line 34: 'inset-0 m-auto h-fit') is correctly implemented
Console hydration warnings about span inside select/option elements could be cleaned up by removing x-* debug attributes in production build
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 fixes verified: 1) All modals (Report, AddCar, AddCustomer, Expense) are centered at viewport center (960px on 1920px viewport) regardless of sidebar visibility. The fix was removing 'md:ml-[16rem]' from dialog.jsx and using 'inset-0 m-auto h-fit' for centering. 2) Report Modal redesign complete: icons on all 6 report type buttons, red PDF button, yellow/amber Yazdır button, vehicle filter appears when 'Araç' type selected with 'Plaka Ara' input and 'Araç Seç' dropdown.

modal_centering.fix_details: Changed from 'left-[50%] top-[50%] -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 md:ml-[16rem]' to 'inset-0 m-auto h-fit'
